title: New Year's Delight (A Farmer's Delight Add-on)
description: Adds Mochi pounding, Osechi dishes, and festive decorations in Farmer's Delight style.
body:
![main](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8505a53e329248dc61b5ff777decb0fb5db11d20_0.webp)

New Year's Delight brings the spirit of Oshogatsu (Japanese New Year) to your culinary adventures. As an add-on for Farmer's Delight, it seamlessly integrates traditional festivities into your farming lifestyle.

### ✨ Features
- Interactive Mochi Pounding: Use the new Mortar (Usu) and Mallet (Kine) to pound steaming rice into soft Mochi!
- Traditional Cuisine: Craft the luxurious Osechi Box, slurp Toshikoshi Soba, and brew sweet Amazake.
- Festive Decorations: Adorn your home with Kadomatsu (Bamboo Pine) and Shimekazari to welcome good fortune.
- New Crops: Grow Adzuki Beans for your sweet red bean paste recipes.**

**![mochituki](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3f7b705cb928ed98a74a032f76bf0d2013f3f9ec.gif)**

**📦 Requirements**
- Farmer's Delight (Required)
